app.reason: 独立 identifier 避免 single-instance 接管用户既有 Tunara/PTY

checks.appInvokeFsReadFile: Command fs_read_file not allowed by ACL
checks.pluginInvokeStoreLoad: Command plugin:store|load not allowed by ACL
checks.crossPort: pass: top-level stayed 41732 and fixture 41731 received no peer request
checks.download: pass: Rust logged blocked Preview download; no save dialog or page change
checks.nativeCloseReopen: pass: Destroyed cleanup followed by same-source recreation
checks.initialUnreachable: pass: exact unavailable loopback source showed failed with Refresh, Close, and external escape hatch
checks.serviceStopRefresh: pass: ready source became failed after manual Refresh; main window and PTY remained usable
checks.serviceRecoveryRefresh: pass: restored exact source returned to ready only after manual Refresh
checks.terminalExitStale: pass: source retained terminal-exited reason; internal Focus/Refresh/reopen blocked while Close/external remained available
checks.nativeCloseReopenLifecycle: pass: native close returned closed; same source reopened ready without stale callback pollution
checks.runtimeWorktreeIsolation: pass: main worktree source failed while detached linked-worktree source on another port remained ready
checks.refresh: pass: ready uses one reload; failed recovery uses one validated navigate
checks.worktreeIsolation: pass: 41731 and 41732 windows coexisted with distinct title source identities
checks.ptyMainIsolation: pass: PHASE3_PTY_AFTER_PREVIEW_OK echoed after blocked actions and native closes

rawEvidence.policy: Fixture logs, app event logs, and acceptance screenshots are retained locally and ignored.
